mnemonics.title: Exception Handling Keywords
mnemonics.content: Try To Catch Helpers - Remember Try, Throw, Catch as the three main keywords

mnemonics.title: Catch Order
mnemonics.content: Specific Patients Get Better Care First - Specific exceptions should be caught before general ones

mnemonics.title: Exception Safety Levels
mnemonics.content: No Strong Basics - No-throw, Strong, and Basic guarantees
